rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §56.226 governs payment of state credit for a student program. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not affect this statute's operative mechanics or funding flows.
quote: Sec. 56.226. PAYMENT OF STATE CREDIT. (a) At least once each year, the coordinating board shall submit to the commissioner of education a report on state credit awarded under the program during the preceding academic year.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. The rule concerns a higher education state credit program unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
